data.description:
## Finding (pre-beta deprecation sweep — internal-only)
Several internal back-compat shims and dead signature-compat params carry no external contract and are safe to remove pre-beta (low/no external dependence). Grouped as one low-risk cleanup. (Excludes `llm/plan_review/registry.py:55` `_detector_matches` re-export, which is handled by the SC2 ticket.)

Citations:
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/acli.py:146` `acli_cmd` param — "accepted for back-compat, no longer used".
- `src/rebar/llm/prompting/prompts.py:627` `langfuse_cfg` param — "no longer drives a text fetch".
- `src/rebar/review_bot/adapter.py:175-176` `config` param — "kept for signature stability".
- `src/rebar/llm/runner.py:67-70` historical structured-output strategy field kept for RunRequest contract.
- `src/rebar/llm/workflow/criterion_preview.py:275` back-compat sync shim (library/tests).
- `src/rebar/llm/code_review/detectors.py:79-83` `run_security_detectors` deprecated alias (story 7f0d) → `run_detectors`.
- `src/rebar/reducer/_cache.py:13-24` pre-v3/v4 replay-cache branch (cache is disposable, regenerated).
- `src/rebar/mcp_server.py:20,34` `_mcp_models` re-export shim (verify no external importer).

## Remediation
Remove each after confirming no live/external caller (internal + tests only). Update the few call sites/tests. Drop dead params from signatures. The reducer `_cache` branch is safe because the cache is disposable (regenerated), not a source of truth — do NOT confuse with the event-schema/on-disk-store back-compat category, which is KEEP.

cascade_flag: drops params + internal aliases — grep callers/tests for each before removal; confirm `_mcp_models` and `run_security_detectors` have no external importers.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each listed shim/param removed after confirming internal-only usage
- [ ] Call sites and tests updated; test suite green
- [ ] `reducer/_cache.py` pre-v3/v4 branch removed (cache still regenerates correctly)
- [ ] No change to event-schema / on-disk-store replay compat (that category stays)
data.title: Remove internal-only back-compat shims + dead signature params
